Video.summary: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: House Robots

Video.summary: Follow Team Chaos's journey. From humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Chaos 2

Video.summary: Matilda takes centre stage again, as she attempts to pull as many competitors into the pit as possible in another tug of war. How will the competitors fair against the hazards of the arena and the merciless house robots?
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: Competitors are once again tasked with defending their land in King of the Castle, will they defend their reign or be overthrown by the house robots? An even match in the semi-finals causes the house robots to forcefully decide a winner.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: Dead Metal takes to the ring to stop any competitors from progressing to the stage of the competition.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: First of the two Semi-Finals to determine which two of the six heat winners will progress to The Second Wars Grand Finals. The house robots are showing no mercy in the gauntlet and the competitors test their accuracy in this weekĺs trial, Pinball.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: The last Semi-Final, competitors will once again battle the house robots in Pinball, evade them in the gauntlet and use them to destroy other competitors in the arena.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: The Grand Final arrives, only the best robots have made it this far. The four remaining robots face two eliminators and a playoff. The two winners then face each other to determine who will be named champion of Robot Wars: The Second wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: An insightful view into how Robot Wars Series 1 was created.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Video.summary: Karma comes for one of the competitors as the Semi-Finals commence in spectacular fashion. There are no specials this week as the knockout battles take priority in deciding who will win the crown.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: More heat winners are pitted against each other in knockout competition. The robots attempt to ram, flip and burn their way to the finals, all while trying to avoid the house robots.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: This is what itĺs been building up to, The Grand Final is here. Which of the successful semi-finalists will be crowned champion of Robot Wars: The Third Wars?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: The Grudge Matches gave competitors an opportunity to come back and settle some scores. A one-off episode featuring a variety of battles; Judgement Day, Reserve Rumble, Inferno Insurrection, Ramrombit, Super Showdown and Internet Insurrection.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grudge Matches

Video.summary: Take a look back at the phenomenal second series, relive the highs and lows of the house robots and competitors of The Second Wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Best Of

Video.summary: Let the battle for the Third Wars crown commence. With the trials being replaced with all out combat, this series is set to be the most brutal yet.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Teams from across the UK enter the arena in hopes of besting the house robots and making it to the Grand Final. The knockouts keep on coming as eight more competitors think they have what it takes to survive the Robot Wars.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: Eight fresh competitors ready to prove their mettle in the arena. Featuring a special event, Middleweight Melee, a single exhibition battle between five robots weighing under 45.4kg.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: As the knockouts continue to streamline the competition, this weekĺs special has separate competitors trying to knock-down objects and hit targets to score the most points in Pinball Warriors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: Competitors need to hold their own in this weekĺs trial, King of the Castle, where they must defend a circle in centre of the arena against the unforgiving house robots. How many will survive to make it to the semi-finals?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: House robot, Shunt goes head-to-head with the competitors. Itĺs his job to remove the competitors from the ring by any means necessary in this weekĺs trial, Sumo. Will Shunt do the house robots proud, or will the competitors give him the slip?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: Even more barrels are stacked up, only to be knocked down by a competitor in another Pinball Warrior. After a one-sided fight, a unanimous decision from the judges decides the victor of this weekĺs heat finals.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: This weekĺs special event has legs. The Walker Battle special featured robots that do not use wheels or tracks as locomotion battling it out, do they stand a chance against the house robots?
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: Half-way through the heats and Pinball Warrior returns to Robot Wars as another robot comes to test their aim and score against the house robots. The arena claims another robot as the knockout competitions march on.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: The last robot football of The Third Wars in this weekĺs special. A spot in the final isnĺt the only thing the heat final can offer one of the competitors this week.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: The sixth Pinball warrior run introduces another competitor to test their skills against the targets, and the house robots. In the knockouts, the house robots are being exploited as the competitors over-crowd the CPZ zones.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: We see more teams from around the UK bringing in their unique, sometimes amusing, sometimes terrifying robots to battle against each other. Sergeant Bashĺs flamethrower is put to good use in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: Walker Battle returns as the contestants for this weekĺs special prepare to put their best foot forward against the other legged robots. A competitor makes the house robots sweat in the knockouts.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat M

Video.summary: Pinball Warrior is back for the eighth time this series and the heats are nearing their end. One of the competitors uses its speed to great effect.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat N

Video.summary: The penultimate Pinball Warrior run is this week. The house robots risk their own metal to attack the competitors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat O

Video.summary: The last heats of The Third Wars, as the finals approach, desperation grows among the competitors to secure a place in the finals. As well as the final heat, this episode features the final Pinball Warrior run of the third series.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat P
